meaning: adj.跛足的,僵痛的,不完全的,金属薄片,不知内情的人,(辩解、论据等)无说服力的vi.变跛,瘸行vt.使成残废
examples: You have made me almost lame!
What do I want with a lame donkey?
So enough with the lame analogy for now.
But will this self-imposed deadline for departure leave Rhodri Morgan as a "lame-duck" first minister?
One that is wrapped in plastic, sequins, lame, ruffles, pailettes and a hint of saloon.
